The '''2016 London Broncos season''' was the thirty-seventh in the club's history and their second consecutive season out of the [[Super League]]. Competing in the [[2016 RFL Championship|2016 Kingstone Press Championship]], the club was coached by [[Andrew Henderson (rugby league)|Andrew Henderson]], finishing in 2nd place and reaching the Fourth Round of the [[2016 Challenge Cup]]. They failed to achieve promotion after finishing 6th place in the [[2016 Super League Qualifiers]].

It was their first season at the Ealing [[Trailfinders Sports Ground]]. They exited the Challenge Cup with a defeat by [[Featherstone Rovers]].

==2016 milestones==
<!--*In August 2012 [[Tony Rea]] was named the Bronco's coach for the 2013 season, after serving in a caretaker capacity in the second half of the 2012 season.<ref>[http://www.rleague.com/content/article.php?id=45230 Tony Rea named permanent London coach] {{webarchive |url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130201181157/http://www.rleague.com/content/article.php?id=45230 |date=1 February 2013 }} ''rleague.com'', 21 August 2012</ref>-->
